text: The first space I inhabited felt strangely empty, illuminated harshly but without warmth. The clean, almost clinical design and the quiet tension of emergency preparedness evoked a sense of anticipation or unease. Stepping into the second space, I am struck by the vivid and playful colors, the promise of creativity and exploration. I feel a cautious curiosity here—invited to engage with ideas and inventions, yet mindful that innovation so often brings its own complexities. My mind oscillates between alert solitude and inspired engagement.
